name_en: Premium quality, B-family's latest soft structured messenger bag. Crafted from protective cotton-blend fabric, decorated with fine knit B-family exclusive check and lined with the same fabric. Named for the B-clasp on the front pocket, which bears the Burberry logo. The curved design incorporates brushed metal hardware and a hand-stitched top handle, inspired by a saddle shape. Equipped with an adjustable mesh shoulder strap with leather trim and a discreet Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossed detail. Dimensions 27.5 x 11 x 19cm
